description.en: Joshua Tenenbaum, Vin de Silva, and John Langford introduced Isomap for nonlinear dimensionality reduction. It builds a neighborhood graph, estimates geodesic distances along that graph, and embeds the data to preserve global manifold geometry.
description.zh: 约书亚·特南鲍姆、维恩·德席尔瓦和约翰·兰福德提出 Isomap 用于非线性降维。它构建邻居图，沿图估计测地距离，并嵌入数据以保持全局流形几何。

license.en: MIT profile image; reuse rights not stated.
